Title: GordonRamsay.com - Recipes
Author: Gordon Ramsay
Description: Gordon Ramsay is a British chef, restaurateur, television presenter, and writer. His restaurant group, Gordon Ramsay Restaurants, was founded in 1997 and has been awarded 17 Michelin stars overall. His signature restaurant, Restaurant Gordon Ramsay in Chelsea, London, which he founded, has held three Michelin stars since 2001.

Title: The Love Chef – Recipes
Author: The Love Chef
Description: Francis Anthony, The Love Chef, has shared his cooking expertise and enthusiasm for over 30 years as the in-house chef for Live! With Regis and Kathy Lee and Live! With Regis and Kelly. He is often featured in Gourmet and Food and Wine magazines.

Title: Recipes – Real Baking with Rose
Author: Rose Levy Beranbaum
Description: Rose is a contributing editor to Brian Hoffman’s Bake from Scratch magazine.

Title: Home | Alton Brown
Author: Alton Brown
Description: Alton Brown is an American television personality, food show presenter, author, voice actor, and cinematographer. He is the creator and host of the Food Network television show Good Eats that ran for 16 seasons
